title: TritonBall website
description: Led development of the website for a new sports analytics org at UCSD (TritonBall). Reviewed PRs, shipped deployments, and built a clean Tailwind UI.

title: Sports Predictive Analysis Research Paper
description: Co-authored a paper predicting cricket player ratings using 1,700+ player records and compared multiple ML models (R² ≈ 0.84).

title: Specialized Data Analysis Projects
description: A collection of applied projects including car price prediction, COVID-19 statistical analysis, and life expectancy modeling.

title: Dubai College Cricket Scoring Web App
description: Built a web app for online cricket scoring and analytics, replacing an older manual workflow for teams and coaches.

title: EEG Letter Recognition Pipeline
description: End-to-end pipeline turning raw EEG into recognized handwritten letters using deep learning + classical ML.

title: Agentic Model Recommender (Intern Project)
description: Built a tool-using LLM workflow that recommends ML models for tabular/NLP/vision tasks with schema validation and recovery.

title: Portfolio Website (React + Vite)
description: Single-page portfolio with animated sections, responsive navbar, theme switcher, and GitHub Pages deployment.

title: Data Dashboard Prototype
description: Prototype dashboard for exploring a dataset with filters, derived metrics, and responsive layout.

title: API Data Explorer
description: Small app that fetches API data and presents it with loading/error states.

title: Visualization Mini-Project
description: Mini visualization project exploring patterns in a dataset using charts and annotations.

title: UI Component Library Sketch
description: A small set of reusable UI components (buttons, alerts, cards) with consistent styling.

title: Course Lab Collection
description: A curated set of class labs and experiments demonstrating DOM manipulation, theming, and dynamic data rendering.
